summary: A hip, feature-rich cybersecurity application with all modern bells and whistles

existing_features.title: Create a modern cybersecurity dashboard that displays real-time security metrics including threat level indicators, recent security events, and system status overview
Create a security alerts system with real-time notifications for critical security events, featuring alert dismissal and acknowledgment functionality
Build a network activity visualization showing active connections, data transfer rates, and suspicious activity detection with interactive filtering
Implement a security scan feature that allows users to initiate system scans, view scan progress, and display detailed scan results with identified vulnerabilities
Create a user authentication and access control system using Internet Identity for secure login and role-based permissions
Build a security policy management interface where users can view, enable, disable, and configure security policies (firewall rules, access controls, encryption settings)
Implement a security analytics section with charts and graphs showing threat trends over time, attack patterns, and vulnerability statistics
Create an incident response workflow system allowing users to document security incidents, assign severity, track resolution status, and add response notes

Design a cutting-edge, cyberpunk-inspired visual theme with neon accents, dark mode interface, glowing effects, and futuristic typography that conveys technical sophistication and modern security aesthetics
Add a 'Sign Policy' button to each PolicyCard component that calls the backend sign function and updates the UI to show signature status
Display signature verification status on the SecurityPolicies page showing whether each policy's signature is valid, invalid, or unsigned
Create React Query hooks for signing policies and verifying policy signatures with proper cache invalidation

new_feature_requests.summary: Build hip cybersecurity app with all bells and whistles
Implement a threat monitoring system that tracks and categorizes security threats (malware, phishing, unauthorized access attempts, DDoS) with timestamps and severity levels
Add digital signature functionality for network configurations or security policies
Add a digital signature field to the SecurityPolicy type in the backend that stores a cryptographic signature string for each policy
Create a backend function to sign a security policy that accepts a policy ID and generates a cryptographic signature based on the policy content
Create a backend function to verify a policy signature that checks if the stored signature matches the current policy content
